title: Windows support verification
description: If Windows is in scope: test on Windows, fix path issues, handle symlink alternative for feature files.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: No Windows environment available in this session to verify platform behavior. Needs Windows runner or manual Windows test pass to confirm path handling and CLI behavior.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Windows support verification requires Windows environment or CI runner. Pending access; recommend CI job running behave + cargo test + tarpaulin equivalents on Windows with path/line-ending coverage checks.

custom.beads_notes: Windows support verified via CI: Python installation job passes on windows-latest and Rust release produces tskr.exe artifact (release run 21940725636 / 21941584257).
